channel.title: TABConf 2025 on ₿itcoin Transcripts
channel.description: Recent content in TABConf 2025 on ₿itcoin Transcripts

item.title: Merkle Trees is the Perfect Place for UTXOs: Floresta as a Chain Source for BDK
item.description:
📌 Learn more about this talk on GitHub: ⭐️🐙 https://github.com/TABConf/7.tabconf.com/issues/33

🌱🧰 Explore bdk-floresta A work in progress BDK chain source crate that uses floresta-chain + floresta-wire to run a local, trustless node and wallet directly on your device 📲🧱 Perfect for mobile and low spec setups ⚡️

🧠 What this talk covers 🌳 Utreexo 101 Merkle proofs, validation, and bridge nodes 🔍 How Floresta leverages Utreexo and how it differs from utreexod 🏗️ A clear BDK architecture overview 🎬 Live demo Creating and syncing a wallet using the crate ✅

🎯 If you’re a dev or a Bitcoin enthusiast who wants lightweight, self contained wallets that can run anywhere, this one’s for you 🛠️🟠

⚡️🛠️⚡️🛠️⚡️🛠️⚡️🛠️⚡️🛠️⚡️🛠️⚡️🛠️⚡️🛠️⚡️🛠️⚡️🛠️⚡️🛠️⚡️🛠️⚡️🛠️⚡️🛠️

🟠 TABConf is a technical Bitcoin conference built for builders. We bring protocol + application devs together to collaborate, debate, and push Bitcoin forward. 🧠🔧

🎥 On this channel you’ll find: 🗣️ Full talks • 🧑‍🏫 workshops • 🧩 panels 🛠️ Builder Days sessions • 🔍 deep dives on: 🧱 Bitcoin Core • ⚡️ Lightning • 🕵️ privacy • 🔐 security • 🧰 the tooling teams ship with

🎟️ TABConf 8 tickets are on sale now! 🗓️ Oct 12–15, 2026 • 📍 Atlanta, GA 🏛️ Georgia Tech Exhibition Hall

🎫 TABConf 8 Tickets 🟠 Pay with Bitcoin: https://checkout.opennode.com/p/7d51f71f-f3e6-4159-bbfa-3a231d14e5b8

💳 Pay with Stripe: https://buy.stripe.com/00w4gzapSf0o4ubg2mdQQ0b

🌐 TABConf Website https://tabconf.com

🔗 All links hub https://linktr.ee/tabconf

🫂 TABConf Community 💬 Discord: https://discord.gg/TRaX8M7amU

🐦 Follow us on X https://x.com/tabconf

🎧 Subscribe to the TABConf Podcast 🍎 Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/tabconf-sessions/id1867836916

🟢 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/11Ram7ccTjBeiwhYoDVtF4?si=ec8bab9fdc2945cd

⛲️ Fountain: https://fountain.fm/show/fqYiANm1II8INYOodXaj

⭐️ Star us on GitHub 🐙 https://github.com/TABConf

item.title: Post Quantum CISA: Signature Aggregation for Bitcoin’s Future
